targetUser: Technical evaluator planning a future local/BYOK setup with explicit secret boundaries.
businessJob: Explain the future local/BYOK setup path before any provider configuration or secret handling exists.
valueHypothesis: A future Capsule could help evaluators understand what setup decisions are needed while keeping keys and providers outside the public repo.
day1UserBenefit: A visitor sees the future local/BYOK direction without API keys requested, .env creation or provider configuration.

publicSafeExamples: Conceptual security preference with no secret values
forbiddenData: No email, phone, DNI, customerId or tenantId
No API key, provider key or connector payload
No prompt text, raw evidence or private runtime path

runtimeBoundary: No private runtime is included; this manifest is not executable and does not configure providers.
connectorBoundary: No connector execution is included; provider and connector setup remain outside C03.
dataBoundary: No secrets, no customer data, no telemetry, no PII, no prompt text, no raw evidence and no connector payloads are included.
complianceBoundary: No regulated advice, compliance certification, legal audit proof or ROI guarantee is provided.
ipBoundary: This public manifest preserves the source-available launcher posture and does not expose private runtime code.
cloudHandoffBoundary: Future Cloud handoff would require separate approved implementation and review before any hosted behavior exists.
localByokBoundary: Future local/BYOK setup requires a later approved config placeholder; no API keys or provider settings are requested here.
futureImplementationNotes: A future implementation would require separate local/BYOK configuration boundaries outside this public manifest.
A future implementation would require approved secret handling before any provider setup exists.
C03 ships manifest only, not executable template behavior.
